rulings.Case Title: DOMINIC VENTIMIGLIA VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES
rulings.Rulings: LATE TENTATIVE: ON CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JUNE 9, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. THIS MOTION IS GOING TO BE HEARD IN DEPEPARTMENT 206. Berry and Berry¿s motion to compel further response to demand for production of documents is granted. Berry and Berry has the authority under General Order 41 to propound discovery and move to compel. General Order 41 is a valid exercise of this courts inherent authority to craft new procedures and manage the litigation pending before it. (Code Civ. Proc. § 187; Asbestos Claims Facility v. Berry & Berry (1990) 219 Cal.App.3d 9). Plaintiffs¿ attorney of record, the law office of Keller, Fishback & Jackson LLP shall pay monetary sanctions of in the amount of $750.00 to Berry and Berry within 15 days. Sanctions are warranted because Plaintiffs¿ position lacked substantial justification. = (220/JJM)
